name: Old Fashioned Baked Macaroni and Cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook macaroni as directed on the package.
2. Pour cooked macaroni into a 3-quart baking dish.
3. Melt butter in a saucepan over low heat; blend in flour, salt, pepper, and mustard.
4. Add milk and Tabasco to the saucepan. Cook over moderate heat, stirring constantly, until the sauce is thick and smooth.
5. Remove the sauce from the heat and stir in cheese until melted.
6. Combine the sauce with the cooked macaroni.
7. Mix together melted butter, bread crumbs, and paprika.
8. Sprinkle the topping mixture evenly over the macaroni.
9. Bake at 350°F for 25-30 minutes.
